name: Ubuntu
tagline: The world's most popular Linux distribution
description: Ubuntu is the go-to choice for Linux newcomers. Built on Debian, it ships with a polished GNOME desktop, extensive hardware support, and an enormous community. Canonical provides long-term support (LTS) releases every two years, meaning security patches for five years. The Snap package ecosystem gives access to thousands of apps in a sandboxed format alongside traditional apt packages.
